heading: AI Receptionist-
24/7 Coverage
hero.description: Never miss a Call, Booking or Opportunity again. Deliver instant, professional phone support—day or night—with our intelligent AI receptionist answering every customer, every time.

image.alt: AI Receptionist wearing headset working on laptop

keyCapabilities.heading: Key Capabilities:
keyCapabilities.subheading: Empower your business with intelligent call management — always on, always professional.

cards.title: Always Available
cards.description: Every call is answered instantly, day or night. No more missed clients, no more lost bookings.

cards.title: Unlimited Capacity
cards.description: Handles unlimited incoming calls and bookings 24/7, so your business is always open.

cards.title: Call Recording & Transcripts
cards.description: Every conversation is recorded, summarised, and transcribed, giving you a clear record to review at any time.

cards.title: Professional, Consistent Service
cards.description: Your AI greets clients politely, provides accurate information, and represents your brand exactly the way you want.

cards.title: New Dedicated Number Provided
cards.description: Each business receives its own dedicated number for a professional setup.

cards.title: Call Forwarding Option
cards.description: Prefer to keep your existing number? No problem, we provide clear step-by-step instructions.

integrations.heading: Connect Seamlessly with Your Favorite Tools
integrations.description: Sync your AI Receptionist with CRMs, booking apps, and communication platforms like:

card.alt: Integration with Google Calendar, Outlook, and Cal.com

howItWorks.subheading: Seamless Call Handling with Human-Like Precision.

steps.title: Connect
steps.description: Link your calendar and communication tools seamlessly for automation.

steps.title: Automate
steps.description: Our AI intelligently manages calls, bookings, and reminders 24/7.

steps.title: Grow
steps.description: Save time, reduce cancellations, and focus on scaling your business.

cta.heading: Ready to Automate Your Scheduling?
points: No training downtime or onboarding needed
Works in multiple languages and accents
